known_issues: Login page has unwanted shaking/animation effect that needs to be removed
App not working properly - general functionality issue reported

existing_features.title: Replace the existing health recommendation system with a student placement portal that manages student profiles, company listings, job postings, and application tracking
Create a student dashboard that displays the logged-in student's profile, shows available job postings they are eligible for, and lists their application history with current status
Implement a job application flow where students can view job details and submit applications, with automatic eligibility checking based on CGPA and branch requirements
Create an admin view that allows placement coordinators to add new companies, post job openings, and update application statuses for students

Design a professional placement portal interface with a cohesive visual theme using corporate colors (navy, teal, gold accents), clean typography, and a modern card-based layout that emphasizes clarity and professionalism
Implement student profile creation and editing that allows users to input and update their academic details, skills, and resume link
Remove any unwanted shaking, wobbling, or animation effects from the login page interface to ensure a stable, professional appearance
Remove the caffeine.ai attribution link and text from the Footer component while preserving the copyright notice and institutional placement disclaimer
Investigate and fix any runtime errors or console errors preventing the app from functioning correctly, including authentication flow issues, data fetching failures, or component rendering problems
Verify that the Internet Identity authentication integration is working correctly and users can successfully log in and out
Fix any broken routing or navigation issues preventing users from accessing dashboard, profile, admin panel, or job details pages
Validate that all React Query hooks are properly configured and data fetching operations complete successfully without infinite loops or stale data issues
Check and fix any TypeScript compilation errors or type mismatches that may be causing runtime failures

new_feature_requests.summary: Remove caffine.ai watermark from the page
Ensure the backend actor initialization and canister communication is functioning properly with correct canister IDs and agent configuration
